column2: Record: 3-12-1, Finished 5th in NFC East Division… L 16-6 vs Los Angeles Rams; W 16-13 at Atlanta Falcons (OT);  L 28-13 at Dallas Cowboys;  W 27-3 vs Green Bay Packers;   L 41-34 vs San Diego Chargers; L 17-13 vs Philadelphia Eagles; L 38-17 at Kansas City Chiefs; T 20-20 at St. Louis Cardinals (OT); L 38-20 vs Dallas Cowboys; L 15-9 at Detroit Lions; L 33-17 vs Washington Redskins; W 23-0 at Philadelphia Eagles; L 27-12 at Los Angeles Raiders;  L 10-6 vs St. Louis Cardinals; L 17-12 vs Seattle Seahawks; L 31-22 at Washington Redskins.
